summary: Frontend testing completed for bug fixes: localStorage/sessionStorage mismatch, Barrister teal colour, 'Created and Designed by Deb King' placement, and export button functionality. All critical bugs verified as fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: localStorage vs sessionStorage fix verified: DocumentPreviewPage now reads from sessionStorage first, then localStorage fallback (line 16)
All export functions in CaseDetail.jsx now use localStorage.setItem (lines 857, 864, 1245, 1250)
Barrister View header uses bg-teal-500 (lighter teal) - verified in BarristerView.jsx line 795
'Created and Designed by Deb King' is at BOTTOM only in Timeline print (lines 274-286) and Grounds export (lines 212-227)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified: 1) Print All/PDF All buttons open document preview with Complete Case Bundle (Timeline, Grounds, Notes, Case Summary sections), 2) Barrister View has bg-teal-500 lighter teal header, 3) Progress Print/PDF buttons work correctly, 4) Legal Print/PDF/Word buttons present, 5) 'Created and Designed by Deb King' only at bottom of Timeline and Grounds exports, 6) localStorage/sessionStorage mismatch fixed in DocumentPreviewPage

print_all_button.details: Print All button found and opens /document-preview?mode=print with Complete Case Bundle content

complete_case_bundle_content.details: Document preview shows 'Complete Case Bundle' with Timeline, Grounds, Notes, Case Summary sections

barrister_view_teal_colour.details: Barrister hero has bg-teal-500 class (lighter teal)

timeline_print_deb_king_placement.details: Code review confirms 'Created and Designed by Deb King' is at bottom only (lines 274-286 in TimelineEnhanced.jsx)

grounds_export_deb_king_placement.details: Code review confirms 'Created and Designed by Deb King' is at bottom only (lines 212-227 in GroundsOfMerit.jsx)

localstorage_fix.details: DocumentPreviewPage reads from sessionStorage first, then localStorage fallback. All export functions use localStorage.setItem
